ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image URL of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "social_media_urls" TEXT /* Social media URLs of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image URL of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* External URLs related to the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track to which the feature belongs */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "key_signature" TEXT /* Key signature of the track */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (major, minor) */,
  "tempo_range" TEXT /* Range of tempo (fast, medium, slow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private, unlisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist to which the track belongs */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)
